title: Kineticless: Bonk-B-Gone
description: Adds a hat curio that removes elytra wall damage
body:
Kineticless is a simple mod that relies on Curios.

it adds a curio (for the "head" slot) that makes it so you do not take "kinetic" damage by crashing into a wall in elytra-like flight, crafted as such:

![crafting](https://i.ibb.co/7kZr4Hg/Screenshot-55.png)

If you do not wish for this device to render on your head, you can place it in a crafting table to make an "invisible" variant
